chunks.text: Jean-Paul Jacob Receives Rio Branco Medal - EECS at Berkeley Jean Paul Jacob (M.S. ’65 and Ph.D. ’66) has been awarded a medal of the Rio Blanco Order, one of the highest honors of the Brazilian Government, in part for his work with the College of Engineering as faculty-in-residence in EECS and as special advisor to the Center for Information Technology Research in the Interest of Society (CITRIS). Categories Alumni Honors View Open Faculty Positions
